description: Peel diagnostic from C01n / inv_detect Phase 9. Tests whether the candidate signal survives successive peeling of high-relatedness samples (L1b) and of whole jackknife groups (L2). If peeling destroys the signal, it's family-driven. Feeds D8 in C01d scoring.
question: Q7

l1b_score.description: fraction of signal retained after L1b peel (high-relatedness sample removal)

l2_score.description: fraction retained after L2 peel (jackknife over Q-ancestry groups)
